title.en: Seeing these Ninefold Dao Realm crazy bidding, ...

content.en:
Seeing these Ninefold Dao Realm crazy bidding, Ye Tian was in a good mood.

The legendary creatures that you kill casually can be exchanged for so many third-order Supreme Rule items, and you can make a lot of money by seeing it!

Of course.

If he auctioned it a few more times, these Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm wouldn't be able to come up with too many third-order Supreme Dao Rule items, after all, this was their accumulation of long years!

Soon, the corpse of this legendary-level creature was auctioned off by Ye Tian, and sixty-three low-quality third-order supreme rule items were sold.

After all, this is just an ordinary legendary-level creature, and it can only condense the blood of ordinary legends, that is, the usefulness of ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm peak powerhouses, and it is useless to take the path of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

Therefore, those Ninefold Solstice Dao Realm will not bid at all, and the other Ninefold Solstice Dao Realm is limited, and they can sell sixty-three low-quality third-order Dao Rule items, which is completely one of the Ninefold Dao Realms who is rich in wealth, otherwise they would not be able to quote such a high price.

In the future, if he obtains the corpse of a legendary creature, he will not have such a good chance.

......

"Immortal Emperor, do you have something to do with me?"

Ye Tian looked at Su Changsheng who came to his mansion and asked.

Su Changsheng smiled and said, "Deacon Ye, I came to do a business with you. "

"Oh, what's the business?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Acquire the blood of legends!" Su Changsheng said, "I need a large amount of blood of legends. "

"What do you want from those ordinary legendary bloods?" Ye Tian wondered.

"Credit!" Su Changsheng said helplessly: "I was once in a desperate situation, and in desperation, I used the medium-quality third sequence supreme path rules to comprehend the third sequence supreme dao rules, and I survived the desperate situation, but the foundation was damaged, and only one elder in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance could heal my foundation." But if I want that patriarch to make a move, I don't have this face, I have to let the patriarch of our Sioux tribe come forward and ask the other party to make a move, but how kind of existence does the patriarch have, why do you treat me so favorably? Therefore, I must get enough contributions from the Sioux tribe to be qualified to let the patriarch of my clan put down and invite that patriarch. "

"Legendary blood allows you to get enough to contribute, doesn't it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Su Changsheng nodded, "I still need to gather at least a hundred copies of the blood of legends before it is enough to attract the elders of my clan." "

One hundred!

This amount is very exaggerated, and other Ninefold Dao Realms can't do it at all.

"What price can you pay?" Ye Tian didn't want to help Su Changsheng for free.

"Thirty low-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items, in exchange for a piece of legendary blood, how about it?" Su Changsheng said.

"The price is a bit low!

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Su Changsheng hurriedly said, "Deacon Ye, don't look at the fact that you sold a piece of Legendary Blood at such a high price this time, but they can't get too many low-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items. And I'm different, I've been stranded in the Nine Rank Supreme Dao Realm for countless years, even in the Sioux Clan, I have a very high status, and I know a lot of strong people, not only do I have a lot of low-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items that I have accumulated, but it's not difficult to get together low-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items. Your body is in the outside world, and I will trade low-quality third-order supreme rule items directly to you in the outside world. "

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tianying said.

In this way, he could obtain a large number of third-order supreme rule items, why wouldn't he do it?

"Immortal Emperor, you are waiting for my news in the Legendary Ancient City!"

Ye Tian said.

......

Legends.

Ye Tian began to hunt legendary creatures again, and soon found an ordinary legendary-level creature, and after spending a little time, he besieged and killed it, and obtained a piece of legendary blood.

Then, he had one of the replicas send the corpse of the legendary creature to the Ancient City of Legends.

"Immortal Emperor, this is the first blood of legends!"

Ye Tian said.

"So fast!"

Su Changsheng was also surprised by Ye Tian's speed at killing the legendary-level creature, if he encountered the legendary-level creature, he could only run for his life!

In the years that followed, Ye Tian slew one legendary creature after another.

But occasionally unlucky, he encounters legendary creatures with supreme bloodlines.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying calamity giant ape found Ye Tian, condensed a rule stick with the third sequence of supreme rules, and hit Ye Tian fiercely, directly beating Ye Tian's body to cracks, and it was severely injured in a while.

I had no choice but to flee.

"The legendary-level creature with the blood of the strongest legend is too terrifying, it can't be defeated at all!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

He felt that he had to raise his cultivation to the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and comprehend the rules of the Third Sequence to the Ten Percent Realm, create a third-sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power at the top of a gate, and besiege it with multiple replica bodies to have any hope of confronting.

But if you want to kill the other party, it's hard!

"With such a terrifying legendary-level creature, there is really any hope that those Ninefold Dao Realm can be killed?"

Ye Tian was skeptical.

Unless they have terrifying hole cards, such as the hole cards given to them by the patriarch, they can hope to take out such legendary creatures, but the price to pay is bound to be huge, and they will be killed if they are not careful.

Time flies.

Ye Tian killed more and more legendary creatures, but he also encountered many dangers, and once he was besieged by three legendary creatures with the blood of legends, and three replica bodies fell.

Of course.

Ye Tian also gathered more and more third-order Dao rule items, and under continuous comprehension, his third-sequence Dao rule realm was naturally getting higher and higher.

......

"A team of Supreme Void Demons is besieging and killing a legendary creature!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The hunting range of the Supreme Dao Void Demon and the Supreme Dao Realm is different, and the distance between them is very far, but the frequency of encounters in the Legendary Realm is not high.

The main reason is that the Supreme Dao Void Demons don't dare to approach the Legendary Ancient City, plus they don't dare to break into the Legendary Realm, so the chance of encountering them is naturally low.

But.

Now that he has encountered it, Ye Tian is ready to kill this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

"Don't be in a hurry, wait until they are almost done fighting with this legendary-level creature, and when they are all injured, I will make another move and try to keep them all!" Ye Tian secretly planned.

Thundered!!!!!

The battle over there continued, and these Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons fought desperately to kill this legendary creature.

In fact, the legendary creature itself was wounded and gradually fell into disadvantage.

Unconsciously, this big war has entered a critical moment.

"Almost, it's time for me to make a move!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
